scripts.test:index:no-output: npm run build && dotenv -e .env k6 run ./dist/index.js
scripts.test:index:influxdb: npm run build && dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'K6_OUT=influxdb=$INFLUXDB_LOCALHOST k6 run ./dist/index.js'
scripts.test:index:cloud: npm run build && dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'K6_OUT=experimental-prometheus-rw K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_SERVER_URL=$K6_PROMETHEUS_URL K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_USERNAME=$K6_PROMETHEUS_USER K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_PASSWORD=$K6_PROMETHEUS_PASSWORD k6 run ./dist/index.js'
scripts.deps:example_test: npm run build && dotenv -e .env k6 deps ./dist/api/project/example/conjunto_example/example_test/example_test.js
scripts.test:example_test:no-out: npm run build && dotenv -e .env k6 run ./dist/api/project/example/conjunto_example/example_test/example_test.js
scripts.test:example_test:influxdb: npm run build && dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'K6_OUT=influxdb=$INFLUXDB_LOCALHOST k6 run ./dist/project/example/conjunto_example/example_test/example_test.js'
scripts.test:example_test:cloud: npm run build && dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'K6_OUT=experimental-prometheus-rw K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_SERVER_URL=$K6_PROMETHEUS_URL K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_USERNAME=$K6_PROMETHEUS_USER K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_PASSWORD=$K6_PROMETHEUS_PASSWORD k6 run ./dist/project/example/conjunto_example/example_test/example_test.js'
scripts.test:another_example_test:no-out: npm run build && dotenv -e .env k6 run ./dist/api/project/example/another_example/another_example_test/another_example_test.js
scripts.test:another_example_test:influxdb: npm run build && dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'K6_OUT=influxdb=$INFLUXDB_LOCALHOST k6 run ./dist/api/project/example/another_example/another_example_test/another_example_test.js'
scripts.test:another_example_test:cloud: npm run build && dotenv -e .env -- sh -c 'K6_OUT=experimental-prometheus-rw K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_SERVER_URL=$K6_PROMETHEUS_URL K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_USERNAME=$K6_PROMETHEUS_USER K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_PASSWORD=$K6_PROMETHEUS_PASSWORD k6 run ./dist/api/project/example/another_example/another_example_test/another_example_test.js'
scripts.docker:database: sudo docker exec -it influxdb influx -execute 'SHOW DATABASES'
scripts.docker:measurements: sudo docker exec -it influxdb influx -execute 'SHOW MEASUREMENTS' -database='k6'
